title: Agent Relationships Schema
description: Defines the relationship fields that all agents in agents-index.json should have for visualization, validation, and MCP spawning control.

spawned_by.description: Agent IDs that are allowed to spawn this agent. Use ['router'] for agents only spawnable by the main Claude instance. Use ['any'] for universally spawnable agents like scouts.

can_spawn.description: Agent IDs that this agent is allowed to spawn. Empty array [] for leaf agents that don't spawn others.

invoked_by.description: How this agent is typically invoked. Values: 'router', 'skill:<skill-name>', 'orchestrator:<agent-id>', 'mcp-spawn'

inputs.description: Expected input artifacts or data. Can be file paths, artifact names, or semantic descriptions.

outputs.description: Output artifacts this agent produces. File paths or artifact names.

outputs_to.description: Agent IDs that typically receive this agent's output for further processing.

must_delegate.description: If true, this agent MUST spawn at least min_delegations child agents to complete successfully.

min_delegations.description: Minimum number of child agents that must be spawned. Only relevant if must_delegate is true.

max_delegations.description: Maximum number of child agents allowed. Used for resource control.

leaf_agent.description: Agents that do work but don't spawn others (reviewers, -pro implementation agents)

orchestrator_agent.description: Agents that coordinate other agents (mozart, review-orchestrator, impl-manager)

synthesizer_agent.description: Agents that combine outputs from multiple agents (beethoven)

spawn_permission.description: When agent A spawns agent B, check that B.spawned_by includes A or 'any'
spawn_permission.enforcement: mcp-spawn-agent tool should validate before spawning

can_spawn_check.description: When agent A attempts to spawn agent B, check that A.can_spawn includes B
can_spawn_check.enforcement: mcp-spawn-agent tool should validate before spawning

delegation_requirement.description: When agent with must_delegate=true completes, verify child count >= min_delegations
delegation_requirement.enforcement: goyoke-orchestrator-guard hook or MCP spawn tool

data_flow_check.description: Warn if agent receives data not in its inputs list, or sends to agent not in outputs_to

AgentTree.can_spawn: Show expected children (dimmed if not yet spawned)

EpicOverview.outputs_to: Render data flow arrows between agents

RelationshipGraph.description: Future: Full graph visualization of agent relationships
